title: Friends Dialogues
description: Conversational lines for everyday rhythm and intonation.

sentences.english: I know this sounds dramatic, but I really need five minutes to think.
sentences.chinese: 我知道这听起来很夸张，但我真的需要五分钟想一想。

sentences.english: Could you say that again, but maybe with less panic this time?
sentences.chinese: 你能再说一遍吗？不过这次能不能别那么慌？

sentences.english: That is actually a pretty good plan, which is surprising coming from us.
sentences.chinese: 这其实是个挺不错的计划，从我们嘴里说出来还挺让人意外。
